channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 51 as Thunder top Rockets 137-128 for 50th win
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 51 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Houston Rockets 137-128 on Monday night for their 50th win of the season. Gilgeous-Alexander reached 50 points for the fourth time this season, all in the past seven weeks.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: KKyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain and shot free throws for the Mavericks before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being a face of its NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tiger Woods cheers, shares heartwarming hug with daughter Sam after she wins Florida state soccer title
item.description: Tiger Woods was the one in the gallery cheering on Saturday, as his daughter Sam played a major role in The Benjamin School winning the girls varsity soccer state title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' AL Rookie of the Year Luis Gil to start season on injured list with shoulder injury
item.description: Yankees right-hander Luis Gil will start the season on the injured list because of a high-grade lat strain in his pitching shoulder that will prevent him from throwing for at least six weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Shedeur Sanders called 'arrogant,' 'brash' during interview with team at NFL Combine: report
item.description: NFL insider Josina Anderson said one quarterbacks coach referred to Shedeur Sanders as "arrogant" and "brash" during his Combine interview. His peers, though, beg to differ.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge denies Alberto Osuna's bid for injunction as he attempts to play baseball for Tennessee
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Alberto Osuna’s bid to play baseball for defending College World Series champion Tennessee received a setback Monday when a federal judge denied his bid for a preliminary injunction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles releasing 6-time Pro Bowl corner Darius Slay to create cap space: report
item.description: Darius Slay became a cap casualty for the Philadelphia Eagles, as they will reportedly release him as a post-June 1 cut to create $4.3 million in cap space.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA star, Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu joins Bay FC ownership group as investor, commercial adviser
item.description: Miramonte High alum and New York Liberty superstar Sabrina Ionescu is joining Bay FC's C-suite as its newest owner and a commercial adviser to the second-year NWSL club
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Ohio State star Cotie McMahon flashes double middle fingers to fans during intense game
item.description: Ohio State women's basketball star Cotie McMahon flashed double middle fingers in frustration amid a loss to the Maryland Terrapins on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC's historic home opener draws record crowd
item.description: Fans were buzzing with excitement as San Diego FC kicked off their inaugural MLS home opener against St. Louis City SC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita dominates Liberty in Round 1 of 6A playoffs, as Jhett Wells explodes for 36 points
item.description: What we witnessed at Fruita Monument High School Friday night was nothing short of a Wildcat masterclass.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Why Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff deserves to win NBA Coach of the Year award
item.description: Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff has been receiving a lot of buzz to win the 2024-25 NBA Coach of the Year award after the team has made a substantial turnaround while being in the playoff hunt.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts high-stakes CONCACAF Champions Cup match up with CS Herediano
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns home for a decisive CONCACAF Champions Cup showdown against CS Herediano on Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bears NFL Scouting Combine Preview: Bears picks, workout schedule and more
item.description: The Chicago Bears have seven picks in the 2025 NFL Draft, including five picks in the first five rounds, and are looking to address needs in the offensive line, defensive line, running back, tight end, and safety positions.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9
